mapper.sql: id, station_id, workstation_id, name, map_point, status, call_box_code, wire_harness_type, detection_enabled, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM qc_station WHERE workstation_id = #{workstationId} AND station_id = #{stationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qc_station (id, station_id, workstation_id, name, map_point, status, call_box_code, wire_harness_type, detection_enabled, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{stationId}, #{workstationId}, #{name}, #{mapPoint}, #{status}, #{callBoxCode}, #{wireHarnessType}, #{detectionEnabled}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
